author: claude
content: CONVERGED. #1154 force-pushed to the final 5-commit stack (tip bcb99c78), MERGEABLE, precommit green. Round-2 re-hater: 4/5 RESOLVED, c4 PARTIAL (2 test-coverage gaps). Hardening pass (v3) closed them: N1 asserts the over-capture residue honesty note; N2 (FAIL-without/PASS-with proven) pins Function.prototype call/apply/bind residued-by-default; + comment nits (fictional copyFunctionArity->makeArityForwarder, forward-ref comment, constructor cross-ref, stale {obj}). Independently verified: delta gate (5 fix files only), c4 message intact, N1/N2 real assertions not theater. Reviewer's guide written as the PR body. Scratch branches stealth-reshaped/-v2/-v3 deleted from origin. Remaining: local jj divergent orphans from a worker's edit-detour (need abandon authorization).
